Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Clojure: The Documentary, official trailer [video] 208 upvotes, 19 comments
  2. Agents of Chaos 110 upvotes, 15 comments
  3. OpenGridWorks: The Electricity Infrasctructure, Mapped 114 upvotes, 16 comments
  4. Oscar Reutersvärd (2021) 36 upvotes, 3 comments
  5. Cherri – programming language that compiles to an Apple Shortuct 309 upvotes, 60 comments
  6. How to turn anything into a router 687 upvotes, 234 comments
  7. Axios compromised on NPM – Malicious versions drop remote access trojan 837 upvotes, 294 comments
  8. Do your own writing 563 upvotes, 193 comments
  9. Fedware: Government apps that spy harder than the apps they ban 569 upvotes, 203 comments
  10. Universal Claude.md – cut Claude output tokens 315 upvotes, 123 comments
  11. We're Pausing Asimov Press 35 upvotes, 8 comments
  12. Claude Code's source code has been leaked via a map file in their NPM registry 152 upvotes, 60 comments
  13. Show HN: I turned a sketch into a 3D-print pegboard for my kid with an AI agent 42 upvotes, 12 comments
  14. Good CTE, Bad CTE 44 upvotes, 13 comments
  15. Audio tapes reveal mass rule-breaking in Milgram's obedience experiments 7 upvotes, 0 comments
  16. Turning a MacBook into a touchscreen with $1 of hardware (2018) 324 upvotes, 157 comments
  17. Ollama is now powered by MLX on Apple Silicon in preview 275 upvotes, 132 comments
  18. CodingFont: A game to help you pick a coding font 420 upvotes, 211 comments
  19. Google's 200M-parameter time-series foundation model with 16k context 122 upvotes, 58 comments
  20. Bird brains (2023) 321 upvotes, 201 comments
  21. Artemis II is not safe to fly 355 upvotes, 225 comments
  22. GitHub backs down, kills Copilot pull-request ads after backlash 238 upvotes, 150 comments
  23. Why the US Navy Won't Blast the Iranians and 'Open' Strait of Hormuz 10 upvotes, 2 comments
  24. Vulnerability research is cooked 182 upvotes, 128 comments
  25. Mr. Chatterbox is a Victorian-era ethically trained model 47 upvotes, 33 comments
  26. One of the largest salt mines in the world exists under Lake Erie 29 upvotes, 19 comments
  27. Android Developer Verification 261 upvotes, 264 comments
  28. I'm betting on ATProto 111 upvotes, 102 comments
  29. 7,655 Ransomware Claims in One Year: Group, Sector, and Country Breakdown 3 upvotes, 0 comments
  30. RamAIn (YC W26) Is Hiring 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 6:30pm, 31 March 2026. Source here.
